steps.title: Identify the claim
steps.content: The underlined claim says male and female A. fasciatus share the same sponge microhabitat. Supporting graph data must show at least one male and at least one female present in the same sponge.

steps.title: Require both sexes
steps.content: Choice B mentions only males in one sponge. Choice C pairs males with undetermined individuals, so it does not prove female presence. Choice D mentions only females in one sponge. The remaining choice shows both males and females in each sponge, directly supporting shared microhabitats. The answer is A.
